menu.signOutEverywhereDescription: This signs out every device including this one. You'll need to sign back in.

activeSessions.title: Active sessions
activeSessions.description: Devices currently signed in to your account. Revoke any that you don't recognize.

sessions.confirmDescription: You'll stay signed in here. Every other browser and device will need to sign back in.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Name and avatar shown to teammates.
profile.avatarHint: PNG, JPEG, WEBP or GIF, up to 20 MB.
profile.name: Name

email.title: Email
email.description: We'll send a confirmation link to your current address.
email.hint: Your current email stays active until you click the confirmation link.
email.confirmationSent: Confirmation sent to {{email}}. Click the link to apply the change — it expires in 1 hour.

magic.title: Magic link
magic.description: Get a one-tap sign-in link in your inbox.

connected.title: Connected accounts
connected.description: Methods that can sign you in. Add a social provider for a faster sign-in option.

password.title: Password
password.description: Other sessions will be signed out after a change.
password.hint: Avoid passwords you've used elsewhere. The meter below shows real-time strength.
password.changed: Password changed. Other sessions have been signed out.

danger.title: Delete account
danger.description: Permanently remove your profile and all organization memberships. This cannot be undone.
danger.dialogDescription: We'll send a confirmation link to {{email}}. Click it to permanently delete your account. If you change your mind, ignore the email and nothing happens.
danger.confirmationSent: Confirmation sent to {{email}}. Click the link within 1 hour to permanently delete.
